MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Breanne L. Reese, esq. (760-842-5850) for Plaintiff via Court Call.
No other appearances.

Discussed (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript). The Court vacates the tentative ruling and rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off Calendar at the request of the moving party.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-31-2019 Set For Case Management Conference On Jul-31-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Continued To Jun-17-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Breanne Reese, Esq. 760-842-5850 of Reese Law Group for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Plaintiff requests a continuance since they have a settlement agreement and to vacate the trial date. Party will eventually file a dismissal. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Continued to June 17, 2019. The June 3, 2019 trial date is vacated. Plaintiff to prepare an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
